name: Nolato AB (publ)
summary: Nolato AB (publ) develops, manufactures, and sells plastic, silicone, and thermoplastic elastomer products for medical technology, pharmaceutical, consumer electronics, telecom, automotive, and other industrial sectors. Its Medical Solutions segment offers inhalers and check valves for asthma, insulin pens and infusion sets for diabetes, seals and earpieces for hearing aids, seals for pacemakers and cardiac anchors for heart rhythm treatment, seals and connectors for dialysis, urine catheters and uridomes for urology, catheter balloons and blood purification equipment for surgery, and PCR and allergy tests, and blood analyses for diagnostics; and plastic packaging solutions for pharmaceuticals and dietary supplements. The company's Integrated Solutions segment provides subsystems for vaporiser heating products, mobile phones, and home electronics products, such as injection molded, painted, and decorated components; and adhesive-based components with mechanical and/or cosmetic functions comprising logos, speaker grilles, and three-dimensional design elements. This segment also offers process and material solutions for shielding electronics for electromagnetic compatibility and heat dissipation for electronics. Its Industrial Solutions segment provides engine components, gaskets for engines and exhaust systems, interior details, battery casings, and other products for use in the automotive industry; components for microwave ovens, chainsaws, and grass trimmers; flushing mechanisms for toilets; brew units for coffee machines; and ball retainers and storage seals for ball bearings, armrests, etc. for office chairs and fireproof cable ducts. Nolato AB (publ) operates in Sweden and the other Nordic countries, and rest of Europe; and North America, Asia, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Nordiska Latexfabriken i Torekov AB and changed its name to Nolato AB (publ) in 1982. Nolato AB (publ) was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Torekov, Sweden.
